postToolUse.bash: command -v markdown-link-check >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; tmp_list=$(mktemp /tmp/markdown-link-check-files-XXXXXX) || exit 0; trap 'rm -f "$tmp_list"' EXIT HUP INT TERM; { git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- "*.md"; git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- "*.md"; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "*.md"; } | awk "NF" | sort -u > "$tmp_list"; if [ ! -s "$tmp_list" ]; then exit 0; fi; fails=0; while IFS= read -r file; do if ! markdown-link-check "$file"; then fails=$((fails+1)); fi; done < "$tmp_list"; if [ "$fails" -gt 0 ]; then exit 2; fi
